flashcards.front: What is the meaning of the logical operator NOT?
What is the truth value of the statement P AND Q if P is true and Q is false?
What is the name of the reasoning pattern that states if P IMPLIES Q and P is true, then Q is true?
What is the difference between propositional logic and first-order logic?
flashcards.back: First-order logic is more expressive than propositional logic

flashcards.front: What is the purpose of a truth table?
flashcards.back: To determine the truth value of a statement
